title: Check the Launch Winds
description: Measure wind speed, classify risk, and clear launch only after a verified retest window.

dialogue.text: Nimbus here. Wind is data, not vibes. We'll log two readings, classify the trend, and only launch when the retest confirms control.

options.text: Copy that. Let's set up for a clean measurement run.

dialogue.text: Hold the anemometer at launch-rod height, keep observers 5 m clear, and point the rod away from people before recording anything.

options.text: Perimeter is clear and rod orientation is safe.
Pad spacing is unsafe. Hold and reset before testing.

dialogue.text: Record reading #1 and note gust direction relative to the flight corridor.

options.text: Reading #1 logged. Capture the second sample now.

dialogue.text: Take reading #2 from the same height after a short pause so we can compare consistency.
Interpretation gate: green only if sustained wind is within your club limit and gust spread remains stable. If not, classify and correct before any countdown.

options.text: Within bounds. Run a short confirmation retest window.
Out of bounds or gusting. Enter corrective branch.

dialogue.text: Corrective branch: lower launch rail angle, wait for gust lull, and re-brief the crew on abort calls. If conditions keep worsening, scrub the launch.

options.text: Conditions improved. Restart the two-reading protocol.
Still unsafe. Scrub this window and stand down.

dialogue.text: Hold a short retest window before countdown. Launch is cleared only if no new gust spikes appear.

options.text: Retest stayed stable. Launch conditions verified.
Retest drifted out of limits. Re-enter corrective flow.

dialogue.text: Good hold call. Keep igniters disconnected, clear the pad, and resume only after spacing and orientation are corrected.

options.text: Safety issues resolved. Return to setup.

dialogue.text: Scrub accepted. A no-launch decision under bad winds is a successful safety outcome.

options.text: Try again in a safer weather window.

dialogue.text: Great discipline. You cleared the window with logged evidence, a retest gate, and explicit abort criteria.
